title: 日本ダービーの後に・矛盾する気持ち

text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Racecourse is full of excitement after
the race.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Great run, Bourbon! Awesome job!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
But she's got the Kikuka Sho next, you know. It'd
be great if she could pull off 3,000 meters, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Since she's already lost her chance at winning the
Triple Crown, maybe she won't run in it at all...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, shut it! Our Bourbon's gonna stay the course
for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting. I have come in first place. I have
completed my mission, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She didn't have a bad run... but her dreams of
getting the Classic Triple Crown are out the
window.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Kikuka Sho too. It'd be great if she
could pull off 3,000 meters, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Since she's already lost her chance at winning the
Triple Crown, maybe she won't run in it at all...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, shut it! Our Bourbon's gonna stay the course
for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting. I failed to place. I am very sorry,
Trainer.
Mihono Bourbon suddenly falls silent.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Detecting unknown phenomenon. Current goal of
attaining the Triple Crown has been invalidated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Even if I continue the Twinkle Series, obtaining
the Classic Triple Crown will remain unachievable.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: However, I feel a contradiction within myself.

She speaks slowly, as if unable to find the right
words.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Even if I can't achieve the Triple Crown... I still
want to run in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have yet to successfully run a full 3,000 meters,
but I wish to complete this distance in a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This is my "desire." Is that acceptable, Trainer?

I don't even need to think about how to answer
after hearing her impassioned words. I nod
immediately.
choice_data_list: Yes! Let's go for the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Order acknowledged!

As we renew our conviction to run in the Kikuka
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on your lack of focus and unstable footing,
I have confirmed that you are completely
exhausted. Are you... "okay"?

Rice Shower mumbles her answer in a daze,
making me wonder if she really heard what
Mihono Bourbon said.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I haven't caught up to you yet!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Caught up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're so... amazing... I have to keep... working...
harder...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have to... work... even harder... I have to...
change...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

We bring Rice Shower somewhere safe and make
sure she's awake before we leave the Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. I cannot understand Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Why is she so fixated upon me? Why does she
wish to "catch up" to me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In a race, the result is either "victory" or "defeat."
Rice, however, doesn't focus on either of those
outcomes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
She only expresses a desire to "catch up." That is
the reason she runs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If her definition of "catching up" differs from the
term's typical meaning...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Then what is her real intention? I am unable to
understand what she is running for.

Every runner puts their own feelings into races.
There are some who don't place much importance
on winning.

You can only truly understand an emotion after
you've experienced it for yourself.

Mihono Bourbon's grasp on emotions is tenuous
at best, so Rice Shower's feelings are likely even
harder for her to comprehend.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll be able to understand everything
one day.

text_block_list.text:
I'm certain we'll continue to face off against Rice
Shower in the Twinkle Series.

I tell Mihono Bourbon there's no rush. She'll
understand someday, so she just needs to wait.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The basis of your statement is unclear, but if that
is your opinion, then I determine it is worth
putting into practice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will wait for the day that I understand.
The train quietly moves toward the academy.

Next up is the final race in the Classic Triple
Crown—the Kikuka Sho!
